title: The fittest founder in the room got cancer. Here’s how he used AI to fight back.
slides: What happens when your health data reveals a silent killer?
The fittest founder discovered stage 4 cancer by chance.
He used AI to scan medical literature no human could read.
Now you can analyze your own scans before doctors notice.
Upload your MRI today—before your next routine checkup.
thread_text:
1. Your scan hides a secret.

Tech CEO found stage 4 cancer by accident. No symptoms. No warning.

2. He fed his data to AI.

The system read thousands of studies in minutes. Flagged what radiologists missed.

3. Now it works backwards.

You upload an MRI. AI cross-references it with global medical research.

4. Before your doctor reviews it.

you get a risk score. No wait. No second opinion needed.

5. Test it on your last MRI.

Upload the file today. What does the AI see that you missed?
video_script: What is AI hiding in you?

script: What is AI hiding in you?

instagram.caption:
A fit CEO discovered stage 4 cancer by accident—no symptoms, no warning.

He uploaded his data to AI, which scanned thousands of medical studies in minutes. The system flagged what radiologists had missed.

Now anyone can upload an MRI before their doctor reviews it. You get a risk score cross-referenced with global research—no wait, no second opinion needed.

Your last scan is still sitting on a hard drive. What does the AI see that you missed? ⚡🔬💻

carousel_slides.hook: Your health data hides a killer.
carousel_slides.description: A tech CEO found stage 4 cancer by accident, with no symptoms or warning signs.
He fed his scans to AI, which analyzed thousands of studies in minutes and flagged the tumor.

carousel_slides.hook: Upload your MRI, get a risk score.
carousel_slides.description: AI cross-references your scan with global research, before your doctor even reviews it.
You receive a risk score instantly. No need to wait for a radiologist's review.
Upload the file from your last checkup and see what the AI finds before your next appointment.
